GET /accounts/{account_id}/magic/sites.description: Lists Sites associated with an account. Use connectorid query param to return sites where connectorid matches either site.ConnectorID or site.SecondaryConnectorID.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/magic/sites/{.description: List config revisions for a site, newest first. Returns only revision metadata (revision number and timestamp), not the actual config values. Use the revision fetch endpoint to retrieve a specific revision's config.
Fetch the full config of an individual revision.

port_binding.description: Exactly one of physport or bond_id must be provided.
Exactly one of physport or bond_id must be provided.

result.description: A site with its full configuration.
